events.text: I’ll create the required JSON directly at `/app/answer.json`. The observed frayed/burned webbing is a removal-from-service condition for fall-protection equipment, so this should be a fail with high immediate risk.

  \"rationale\": \"Frayed or burned webbing on fall-protection equipment is a defective condition that can compromise strength and energy absorption. OSHA fall-protection requirements require personal fall-protection systems to be inspected and defective or damaged components removed from service, so the observed work is non-compliant and unsafe as installed.\",
